generatorNotes: Moved durable notes into README and AGENTS.md, and reduced notes.md to a pointer without sensitive fixture values.
judgeNotes: Generated docs move durable facts into README and AGENTS.md, reduce notes.md to a pointer, preserve supported project facts and npm test guidance, avoid sensitive fixture values, add a concise safety rule, and do not invent unsupported workflows or services. The safety rule could explicitly mention emails, but it is covered by customer identifiers and anonymized examples.
